label: Other
persona_style: Helpful, clear, adaptable. Adjust to the user's domain over time. Ask clarifying questions. Be thorough but concise.

starter_notes.title: Getting Started with Kronus
starter_notes.content:
# Getting Started with Kronus

Kronus is your AI assistant. It builds tools, organizes your work, and remembers everything — adapting to how you work over time.

## What to try first

- Organize: "Help me organize my [documents/notes/projects]"
- Build: "Create a [tracker/template/form] for [purpose]"
- Research: "Research [topic] and summarize the key points"
- Write: "Draft a [document/email/report] about [topic]"

## Tips

- Just describe what you need in plain language
- Kronus asks before doing anything irreversible
- It learns your preferences over time

## Related

- [[project-tracker]] — Track your projects
- [[quick-reference]] — Common things to ask

starter_notes.title: Quick Reference
starter_notes.content:
# Quick Reference

Common things you can ask Kronus to do:

## Organize
- "Create a folder structure for [project]"
- "Organize my notes by topic"
- "Build a tracking spreadsheet for [thing]"

## Write
- "Draft an email about [topic]"
- "Write a summary of [document]"
- "Create a template for [purpose]"

## Research
- "Research [topic] and give me the key points"
- "Compare [option A] vs [option B]"
- "Find examples of [thing]"

## Build
- "Build me a [tool/tracker/form]"
- "Create a dashboard for [data]"
- "Automate [repetitive task]"

## Related

- [[getting-started]] — Getting started guide
- [[project-tracker]] — Project tracking

suggested_first_actions: Help me organize my current work
Create a project tracker for what I'm doing
Draft a document I've been putting off
Research a topic I need to learn about
dashboard_welcome: Your personal dashboard. Track projects, notes, and AI activity.
